# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

_<?php

function generateReport(array $postData): array
{
    $host = 'localhost';
    $db   = 'your_database_name';
    $user = 'your_username';
    $pass = 'your_password';
    $charset = 'utf8mb4';

    $dsn = "mysql:host=$host;dbname=$db;charset=$charset";
    $options = [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE            => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES   => false,
    ];

    try {
        $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass, $options);
    } catch (\PDOException $e) {
        throw new \PDOException($e->getMessage(), (int)$e->getCode());
    }

    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    $params = [];

    // Date Range Filter
    if (!empty($postData['start_date'])) {
        $sql .= " AND report_date >= :start_date";
        $params[':start_date'] = $postData['start_date'];
    }
    if (!empty($postData['end_date'])) {
        $sql .= " AND report_date <= :end_date";
        $params[':end_date'] = $postData['end_date'];
    }

    // Status Filter
    if (!empty($postData['status']) && $postData['status'] !== 'all') {
        $sql .= " AND status = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $postData['status'];
    }

    // Category Filter
    if (!empty($postData['category']) && $postData['category'] !== 'all') {
        $sql .= " AND category = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
    }

    // Add more filters as needed
    // Example: User ID filter
    if (!empty($postData['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = (int)$postData['user_id'];
    }

    // Order By (optional)
    $sql .= " ORDER BY report_date DESC";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);

    return $stmt->fetchAll();
}

// Example Usage (simulate $_POST data)
// if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
//     try {
//         $reportData = generateReport($_POST);
//         // Output report data (e.g., to an HTML table, JSON, etc.)
//         // print_r($reportData);
//     } catch (PDOException $e) {
//         // Handle database errors
//         // echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage();
//     }
// }

// HTML form structure for demonstration (would typically be in a separate file)
/*
<form method="POST" action="">
    <label for="start_date">Start Date:</label>
    <input type="date" id="start_date" name="start_date" value="<?= htmlspecialchars($_POST['start_date'] ?? '') ?>"><br><br>

    <label for="end_date">End Date:</label>
    <input type="date" id="end_date" name="end_date" value="<?= htmlspecialchars($_POST['end_date'] ?? '') ?>"><br><br>

    <label for="status">Status:</label>
    <select id="status" name="status">
        <option value="all" <?= (($_POST['status'] ?? '') == 'all') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>All</option>
        <option value="pending" <?= (($_POST['status'] ?? '') == 'pending') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Pending</option>
        <option value="completed" <?= (($_POST['status'] ?? '') == 'completed') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Completed</option>
        <option value="cancelled" <?= (($_POST['status'] ?? '') == 'cancelled') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Cancelled</option>
    </select><br><br>

    <label for="category">Category:</label>
    <select id="category" name="category">
        <option value="all" <?= (($_POST['category'] ?? '') == 'all') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>All</option>
        <option value="sales" <?= (($_POST['category'] ?? '') == 'sales') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Sales</option>
        <option value="marketing" <?= (($_POST['category'] ?? '') == 'marketing') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Marketing</option>
        <option value="support" <?= (($_POST['category'] ?? '') == 'support') ? 'selected' : '' ?>>Support</option>
    </select><br><br>

    <label for="user_id">User ID (optional):</label>
    <input type="text" id="user_id" name="user_id" value="<?= htmlspecialchars($_POST['user_id'] ?? '') ?>"><br><br>

    <button type="submit">Generate Report</button>
</form>
*/
?>
